gymSettings.name: Kinetic Performance Club
gymSettings.tagline: Movement is art. The body of work is you.
gymSettings.description: A modern training club with memberships, coached classes, recovery support, and a storefront configured from real operational data.
gymSettings.heroHeadline:
Movement is art.
The body of work
is you.
gymSettings.heroSubheadline: Membership access, class booking, instructor programming, and member operations all running from one coordinated platform.
gymSettings.promoBanner: Movement is art. The body of work is you.
gymSettings.footerTagline: Built for disciplined training, clear scheduling, and a better member experience.
gymSettings.facilityDescription: Strength, conditioning, coached studios, recovery, and member access are configured as one complete training environment.

facilityHighlights.title: Weight training floor
facilityHighlights.description: Heavy iron, racks, platforms, and enough load to support real strength work.

facilityHighlights.title: Coached studios
facilityHighlights.description: Dedicated spaces for yoga, spin, HIIT, mobility, and coached group programming.

facilityHighlights.title: Conditioning zone
facilityHighlights.description: A cardio and conditioning section for intervals, engine work, and pacing.

facilityHighlights.title: Recovery spaces
facilityHighlights.description: Locker rooms, showers, and recovery support for members who train hard and stay consistent.

facilityHighlights.title: Member lounge
facilityHighlights.description: A quieter zone for transitions between training, meetings, and coaching touchpoints.

facilityHighlights.title: Personal coaching area
facilityHighlights.description: Floor space for assessments, one-on-one coaching, and progress reviews.

contactTopics.title: Phone
details: Front desk support during staffed hours

membershipTiers.name: Basic Monthly
membershipTiers.description: For self-directed members who want full facility access and a small number of coached classes each month.

membershipTiers.name: Premium Monthly
membershipTiers.description: The all-around plan for members who want unlimited class access, stronger recovery flexibility, and occasional coaching support.

membershipTiers.name: Elite Monthly
membershipTiers.description: High-touch access for members who want unlimited classes, guest privileges, and a deeper coaching relationship.

classTypes.name: Yoga
classTypes.description: Mobility-forward sessions for strength balance, recovery, and consistency.

classTypes.name: Spin Class
classTypes.description: High-energy interval rides with coach-led pacing and strong member energy.

classTypes.name: HIIT
classTypes.description: Short, intense conditioning blocks for members who want efficient work.

classTypes.name: Pilates
classTypes.description: Core control, posture, breath, and lower-impact strength development.

classTypes.name: Zumba
classTypes.description: A music-driven group format built for fun, movement, and consistency.

classTypes.name: Boxing
classTypes.description: Technique, conditioning, and sharp coached combinations in a high-focus format.

instructors.bio: Sarah leads mobility-forward classes that improve strength balance, breathing, and recovery discipline.
Mike coaches high-output formats with a focus on intensity, structure, and measurable progression.
Emily brings high-energy coaching, clear pacing, and an inclusive rhythm to every session.
